description_cn: 使点与实体发生碰撞。实体可以是mesh或者brep。内部设为False，使点与实体发生碰撞后保持在实体外部，反之则在实体内部。单向设为True时，网格不会发生碰撞，且不受碰撞影响。
description_en: Causes a point to collide with an entity. The entity can be a mesh or a bridge. Setting "Interior" to "False" keeps the point outside the entity after a collision, otherwise it stays inside. Setting "One-Way" to "True" prevents collisions and ensures the mesh remains unaffected by collisions.

parameters.name: Solid
parameters.desc_cn: 封闭的固体（Brep 或网格）

parameters.name: In
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为False，则点将位于立体图形之外；如果为True，则点将位于立体图形之内。
parameters.desc_en: If false, points will be kept outside the solid. If true they will be kept inside

parameters.name: Uni
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为True，则网格仅用作输入，本身不受碰撞影响。
parameters.desc_en: If true the mesh is used only as input, and is not itself affected by the collisions

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
